subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the One Remembered, when the Call was raised betwixt earth and heaven, that the remembrance and utterance might draw him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی المذکور اذ ارتفع الندآء بین الارض و السماء لیجذبه الذکر و البیان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual transformation, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
